description:
Operating Area: Greece

The Arno Leopard 24m “ZEUS” is a stunning motor yacht that combines sleek, dynamic design with high performance and clever use of space. On the aft deck, wraparound seating surrounds a folding teak table that drops to form a generous sunbed. The cockpit connects to the salon via large double sliding doors, creating an open indoor-outdoor connection and a versatile living space. The main deck also features a barbecue, wet bar, and a generous foredeck sunbathing area.

The lower deck continues to impress with smart space planning and three comfortable guest cabins. The master cabin spans the full beam, the VIP offers a double bed, and a third twin cabin includes an additional Pullman berth.

With a top speed of 28 knots, M/Y ZEUS delivers a thrilling sports-yacht experience—fast, elegant, and elevated by an outstanding crew for unforgettable days across the Greek islands.

blueprint.name: ZEUS
entertainment: External and internal Stereo system with speakers & subwoofers (front and rear)

crew.name: Konstantinos Fakinos
crew.bio:
Captain Konstantinos is a highly qualified and certified Commander with extensive expertise in operating boats up to 24 meters in length. Trained by the Greek Navy Seals and having served in the Greek Special Forces as a Green Beret specializing in underwater demolitions, Captain Konstantinos brings a wealth of experience to his role. He has received comprehensive training from the Hellenic Ministry of Shipping and Maritime Affairs in Survival – Search and Rescue in the open sea, as well as specialized training from the Greek 6th fire department and the European Security Academy. As a skilled rescuer and member of Civil Protection, Captain Konstantinos holds numerous diplomas in night diving, cavern diving, rescue diving, Nitrox, and parachuting. His divemaster diploma (DM-324485) and certifications in Basic Life Support, Prehospital Trauma Life Support, and Basic Life Support in Obstetrics further attest to his expertise in emergency medical care. Additionally, he has completed Wilderness Emergency Care training and is an experienced instructor in kiteboarding, rock climbing, free diving, scuba diving, and spear fishing. M/Y ZEUS is equipped with an automated external defibrillator (AED), a medical-grade oxygen supply, and a certified digital clinical monitor for vital functions—including ECG, heart rate, QRS duration, SpO₂, pulse rate, and pulse index. Additional specialized medical equipment is also on board, ensuring Captain Konstantinos is fully prepared to respond promptly and effectively to any medical emergency.
Languages: Greek (native), English (fluent).

crew.name: Thodora Lila
crew.bio:
Thodora has extensive experience in the tourism industry, having worked in various tourism businesses over the years. Her lifelong love for cooking, which began in childhood, has become a professional pursuit in recent years, allowing her creativity and dedication to flourish. By 2024, she expanded her expertise by working as a cook for M/Y ZEUS. Thodora is admired for her politeness, and energetic behavior, paired with outstanding communication skills that shine in both her professional collaborations and interactions with clients. In her free time, she finds joy in traveling and cherishing precious moments with her family!

Languages: Greek (native), English (fluent).

crew.name: Eirini Kallianoti
crew.bio:
Eirini is a dedicated and versatile person with experience in customer service, administrative roles, and teaching. She has worked in various sectors including hospitality (Galaxy Hotel, Sixteen Cafe Bar, M/Y ZEUS). Eirini has strong organizational and problem-solving skills, honed though her leadership roles in diverse teams. She values transparency, responsibility, and courtesy in her professional conduct, and brings a warm, guest-first approach on board. Her hobbies include traveling, extreme sports and dancing.

Languages: Greek (native), English (fluent).

crew.name: Alexandra Zachou
crew.bio:
Alexandra is a graduate of the Department of Maritime Studies at the University of Piraeus with a strong academic background in the shipping industry. She has combined this knowledge with practical experience in customer service, personal management and administrative support. Through roles in hospitality and administration, Alexandra has developed excellent communication and problem solving skills. With attention to detail and the ability to work under pressure, she consistently provides high-quality support to both customers and colleagues. Her personal interests include dancing, gymnastics, cooking and reading books.

Languages: Greek (native), English (fluent).

crew.name: George Gerostathis
crew.bio:
George is a cheerful and polite person with a dynamic personality and a deep love for the sea. He prioritizes customer service and ensures the safety of the yacht and crew. With experience from the island of Santorini, where he worked on yachts for the company CavoTagoo, and two consecutive seasons on the island of Mykonos with M/Y ZEUS, George is well-versed in high-quality customer service and collaboration within the yachting industry. He is a certified sailor by the Ministry of Maritime Affairs and holds a seaman’s book, a certified safety and firefighting equipment certificate, and licenses for operating speedboats and sailing yachts. Additionally, George holds lifeguard certifications from the accredited school PA.SCH.NA. and a scuba diving license. George seeks opportunities to gain nautical knowledge and aims to excel in the yachting industry.

Language: Greek (native), English (fluent).
